title: rosa horrida subsp. permixta
intro: Rosa horrida subsp. permixta is a subspecies of rose that is a hybrid of Rosa horrida and Rosa moschata, known for its unique and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids, tannins, and essential oils. The health benefits of Rosa horrida subsp. permixta include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rosa horrida subsp. permixta can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
